name: Log4Shell Hash in Events
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC (File Hash) related to Log4Shell Exploit (CVE-2021-44228) is observed.

Note: Log4Shell MD5, Log4Shell SHA1, Log4Shell SHA256 have been prepopulated. Tune these Reference Sets with relevant IOC.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Carbon Black, Cisco AMP, McAfee ePolicy Orchestrator, Microsoft 365 Defender, CrowdStrike Falcon, Carbon Black Protection

when the event matches ("MD5 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell MD5', "MD5 Hash")) OR ("Parent MD5" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell MD5', "Parent MD5")) OR ("SHA1 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA1', "SHA1 Hash")) OR ("Parent SHA1 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA1', "Parent SHA1 Hash")) OR ("SHA256 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA256', "SHA256 Hash")) OR ("Parent SHA256 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA256', "Parent SHA256 Hash")) OR ("File Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA256', "File Hash")) OR ("File Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell MD5', "File Hash")) OR ("File Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA1', "File Hash")) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Log4Shell Hash in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Carbon Black, Cisco AMP, McAfee ePolicy Orchestrator, Microsoft 365 Defender, CrowdStrike Falcon, Carbon Black Protection

AND when the event matches ("MD5 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell MD5', "MD5 Hash"))  OR ("Parent MD5" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell MD5', "Parent MD5"))  OR ("SHA1 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA1', "SHA1 Hash"))  OR ("Parent SHA1 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA1', "Parent SHA1 Hash"))  OR ("SHA256 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA256', "SHA256 Hash"))  OR ("Parent SHA256 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA256', "Parent SHA256 Hash")) OR ("File Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA256', "File Hash")) OR ("File Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell MD5', "File Hash")) OR ("File Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA1', "File Hash")) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: An IOC (File Hash) related to Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228) has been observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
